database-access.title: Centralized Database Access via Registry
database-access.description: All agents use dbx CLI to query any database (MySQL, Postgres, SQLite, etc) via central registry at ~/.config/ai-db/registry.json. Each agent has read-only access to databases; use dbx get/list/query commands for safe access.

change_log.change: Initial instruction set. Defines dbx CLI patterns for safe multi-agent database access.

email-with-attachments.title: Email with Attachments via gws CLI
email-with-attachments.description: All agents use gws-email wrapper (installed at /root/.local/bin/gws-email) to send emails with MIME multipart attachments. Wrapper adds --attach flag to gws CLI for seamless attachment support. Files must be saved to /root/mcp-shared/ before attaching.
email-with-attachments.section: Email with Attachments via gws CLI

change_log.change: Initial instruction set. Defines gws-email wrapper for secure attachment support.

mcp-architecture.title: MCP Server Docker Architecture
mcp-architecture.description: All MCP tools run in Docker containers using base image mcp-optimized:latest with v16 server.js wrapper. Use SSE transport on port 3000. Mount /root/mcp-shared (read-only) for file access. Each tool gets unique host port and Codex bridge mapping.

change_log.change: Initial instruction set. Standardizes MCP container deployment across all platforms.
